0000000000100110 0111001000100111 0 -> sum: 0111001001001101, cout: 0
1111011100101000 0101011000000011 1 -> sum: 0100110100101100, cout: 1
1011101100010001 1010110001000110 1 -> sum: 0110011101011000, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
